*

## 🧪 How to Test (Opcional)

Steps to validate the changes locally:

* [ ] Install dependencies
* [ ] Run tests
* [ ] Start the backend server
* [ ] Validate `/health` endpoint

Example commands:

```
npm test -- --watchAll=false
npm run build
curl http://localhost:8000/health
```

## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting the PR, confirm the following:

* [ ] Commits are small and follow semantic conventions
* [ ] Code follows project standards
* [ ] Existing functionality was not broken
* [ ] Documentation was updated if necessary
* [ ] Tests were added or updated when applicable

* potential risks
* pending improvements

* Database migrations will be introduced in a future PR.
* Authentication will be implemented in the next development phase.
